attack_surface: Lightweight RAG system with FastAPI server. File upload endpoint for single PDF/text ingestion. Vector search and query API. Document parsing with chunking. Minimal authentication. Local LLM integration (Ollama, etc.).
why_target: Under 5k stars = less audited. File upload + document parsing = injection vectors. FastAPI endpoints may have input validation issues. RAG-specific attack surface (prompt injection via documents). Active 2025-2026 development.

attack_surface: Local AI agent execution layer. API/workflow catalog registration. File-based workflow definitions. Tool execution from registered operations. Python-based agent framework. Self-hosted deployment.
why_target: Very low stars (<1k) = minimal security review. Agent execution = code execution potential. Workflow file parsing = deserialization/YAML issues. Tool catalog = plugin injection. 2026 active development. Niche target (agent orchestration).

attack_surface: RAG system combining Docling parser with vector search. REST API endpoints (ingestion, query, collections). Document upload and processing pipeline. Docker-based deployment. LLM integration for responses. MongoDB vector storage.
why_target: Extremely low stars (<200) = almost no audit. Docling parser integration = PDF parsing vulnerabilities. File ingestion pipeline = upload bypass potential. MongoDB injection possible. Docker deployment = container escape potential. Very recent project (2025-2026).
